Custom CSS, development and legacy documentation, external resources, Sphinx configuration, and build scripts.

## Folders
- **[_static](_static/README.md)**: Custom CSS for theming and typography, and SIL Open Font License fonts for the Tomorrow Project.
- **[development](development/README.md)**: Configuration and documentation for building, debugging, and interacting with Pebble firmware and PRF.
- **[legacy](legacy/README.md)**: Documentation for PULSEv2 protocols, battery state transitions, Doxygen usage, SPI flash imaging, Bluetooth stack porting, and FreeRTOS tasks.
- **[reference](reference/README.md)**: External resources related to PebbleOS, including presentations and a video discussion.

## Files
- **[conf.py](conf.py.md)**: Configuration for Sphinx documentation of PebbleOS, including HTML output and myst_parser options.
- **[getting_started.md](getting_started.md.md)**: Guide for setting up a PebbleOS development environment, including building and flashing the firmware.
- **[index.md](index.md.md)**: Documentation index for PebbleOS, detailing features, development, and resources.
- **[make.bat](make.bat.md)**: Batch script to build Sphinx documentation, checking for Sphinx installation and setting paths.
- **[Makefile](Makefile.md)**: Makefile for building Sphinx documentation with customizable options and targets.
- **[requirements.txt](requirements.txt.md)**: Lists Python dependencies for documentation, including Sphinx and related extensions.
